turn_info.content: Hello. I am so broken up and also disgusted from my break-up with my only long-term partner.

results.term: I was so surprised by the hurtful things he said w...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I was so surprised by the hurtful things he said when we broke up I just don't know how to even manage my feelings about all the time we spent together.

results.term: Well, I suppose for him it came out of nowhere. Bu...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Well, I suppose for him it came out of nowhere. But for me I just had slowly come to the realization that he was not the person for me. I fell out of love with him slowly and grew more annoyed by a lot of his behaviors.

results.term: To me we were fighting a lot, and about dumb stuff...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: To me we were fighting a lot, and about dumb stuff like whether or not a salad is a meal.

results.term: And I realized that we were fighting so much becau...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: And I realized that we were fighting so much because I wanted him to eat healthier and be healthier and he was not going to change and it wasn't even right for me to change him if he didn't want help.

results.term: So, I am sure he felt attacked and unattractive an...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: So, I am sure he felt attacked and unattractive and so he lashed out at me.

results.term: I think I did the right thing, not just for me but...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content:
I think I did the right thing, not just for me but for him. It isn't fair to keep dating someone just because being single is hard. 
I just still get weird lingering feelings wondering if he was right and maybe I am too much for a lot of people. I don't think he is right, and my friends disagree but it still hurts and I can still hear him tell me no one would ever love me.

results.term: No, I don't think I have any regrets.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: No, I don't think I have any regrets.

results.term: Yeah? I suppose people just say things when they a...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yeah? I suppose people just say things when they are hurt.

turn_info.speaker: seeker

results.term: Yeah. I think things will work out eventually.

turn_info.content: Yeah. I think things will work out eventually.
